name: Rojo Lobo Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Roughly grind or hand chop the meat to small cubes.
2. Cook the meat in a large cast iron pot with bacon grease and onions, bell peppers, garlic, capers, and 1 tablespoon cumin.
3. Add beer, tequila, 3 tablespoons cumin, other spices (soy sauce, white pepper), and stewed tomatoes. Cook on low heat for 30 minutes.
4. Add the remaining ingredients except the last tablespoon of cumin. Raise the heat and bring to a boil.
5. Lower the heat and simmer for 3 hours, stirring frequently.
6. Just prior to serving, add the remaining cumin and stir well.
